entities.description: Moldovan leu is a fiat currency, with ISO 4217 code MDL, issued by Moldova. currency

złoty is a fiat currency, with ISO 4217 code PLZ, issued by Poland. currency of Poland

Macedonian denar is a fiat currency, with ISO 4217 code MKD, issued by North Macedonia. currency of North Macedonia
